title: ふたつの道が遠いだなんてきっと嘘

text_block_list.text:
After declaring that she would quit modeling, Gold City fully devotes
herself to training. But something's off today...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I lost momentum at the end again. What's wrong with me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I threw away my career for this! Trainer, hit me with your most brutal
training regimen!
choice_data_list: Why don't we take some time off?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you serious? But I can still—
choice_data_list: No buts! You need a change of pace!
No buts! You need a change of pace!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, gosh... Don't have to go into scary teacher mode. Fine, I'll
rest. Happy now?

On our day off from training, I'm walking around town when I spot
Gold City at a cafe.

She's staring at her phone, looking troubled. I figure maybe I should
leave her alone, but she catches sight of me before I can leave.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...I know you're there. Sneak around all you want—you can't mask your
annoying aura.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What, this? Oh.... just looking at old pictures.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Records of practice and my diet, and... some work things. Don't need
these anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Not really. I can just delete them. Racing is all that matters to me now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Not that I have the times to show for it... I just, I don't know, can't go
those last few meters.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Well, change of pace, right? C'mon, if you hover around looking
like my manager, you can be my unwanted attention repellant.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, but don't actually act like my guardian, yeah? Just keep your mouth shut and look like you belong.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What a boring movie.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: They had a few brands I like, but nothing really caught my eye... Sigh.

No matter where we go, Gold City doesn't seem to be having a great
time.

All of a sudden, she stops and looks up. A huge advertisement with
her face on it looms overhead.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? N-no! Just, it's hard to ignore, isn't it? But whatever, won't see
any of those anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Once I retire, the next model will take my place. Stand still for a
second, and you'll fall behind and fade away.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Good riddance, I say. The cameras never saw the real me anyway. Just
a worthless, fake illusion.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...I'm exhausted.
She suddenly stops in her tracks again.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Go on, spit it out. You've been wanting to say something, haven't
you? This whole time—I can tell.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. What, another one of your lectures? No, I'm not missing
anything. My past needs to be tossed out.
choice_data_list: And that includes your phone's pictures?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What are you even talking about? What does my phone have to
do with anything?
choice_data_list: All your modeling memories, that's what.
All your modeling memories, that's what.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: A-are you stupid? Those mean nothing to me, okay? All I care about is running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Here, I'll delete them right now. I don't need them!
She whips out her phone and opens the photo app.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Stupid pictures! I'm so done with these... stupid...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No! ...Er, fine, whatever. Just a little.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...This was my first time in front of a TV camera. Look at my face, I'm
trying way too hard... I can't.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
This was my first commercial. It did pretty good. This is me crying
after my first screwup. Don't look. You never saw that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
This... this was my first pic with a fan. Said her dream was to be a
designer, and have me wear her clothes.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: These don't look very fake to me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, shut up! What do you know, huh?! I'll delete them—all of them!

Her slender finger taps the Select All button, then inches toward
Delete...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'll do it, just... just you watch...
Then, her finger stops.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Why? ...I decided to throw this life away. I have to, or my running'll
never amount to anything!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So why... why, when I'm running, do all the memories come flooding
back?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
During practice, and races—why does it feel like there's a gaping hole
in my heart?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Why can't I just throw it all away? I just want to be rid of it, please!
choice_data_list: You don't need to throw away the real "you."
You don't need to throw away the real "you."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Aha... You're so stupid. You literally said that already. Get a new line,
stupid. I just can't with your stupidity.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh for—No, I really can't!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...No, you did not just say that. What, you think you're like my partner in crime now? Yeah, right!
choice_data_list: No, I think I'm your trainer!
No, I think I'm your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Seriously! How do you keep it up?! Be discouraged for once! Stop
bothering with a pain in the ass like me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Stupid. Stupid, stupid, stupid. You are so stubborn, and cringe, and weirdly arrogant!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Honestly, what even are you? Oh right, you're my "trainer."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...You really think I could run both roads?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah... maybe. I guess I just have to keep looking.
choice_data_list: It might take some time—but that's okay.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Stupid. Telling a runner to take things slow? Sigh. I should probably say sorry to my manager.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hah! Oh, I'm dying just picturing it. But no, I started this, so what do
you have to apologize for?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Appreciate the sentiment, but I'll do this myself. And I'll tell her that,
well, I've got two legs—one for racing, one for modeling.
